case_title: VEGA, ADRIANA vs. ARMENTA, CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VEGA, ADRIANA AS TO DEFENDANT ARMENTA, CHARLES DIVERSIFIED HOSPITALITY,INC DBA LUPANNS RESTAURANT
